title: 'Not just math and numbers': Young people are willing to sacrifice returns for ESG
text: New data shows young people are willing to give up returns to invest in ways that supports causes they care about.

title: Edison International, Southern California Edison Declare Q3 Dividends
text: ROSEMEAD, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The board of directors of Edison International (NYSE: EIX) today declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.7375 per share, payable on Oct. 31, 2023, to shareholders of record on Sept. 29, 2023. The Edison International board also declared the following dividends, payable Sept. 15, 2023, to shareholders of record on Sept. 1, 2023: A semiannual dividend of $26.875 per share on the 5.375% Fixed-Rate Reset Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series A A se.

title: 3 Sorry Dividend Stocks to Sell in August Before It's Too Late
text: Dividend stocks have become investors' favorites in recent months. Tech turbulence and high-interest rates combined to make high-yield stocks an alternative to riskier equities while still beating the yield on fixed-income investments like treasuries.
